title: demorchis celebica
side_effects: Demorchis celebica can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and an increased risk of bleeding due to its potent and unregulated effects on the digestive system. In severe cases, improper use of Demorchis celebica has been linked to liver damage and even respiratory failure, particularly when combined with other medications or substances. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health purposes to minimize the risk of these side effects.
